debug_info.goal:
case neg.refine_3.inr
ι : Type u_1
𝕜 : Type u_2
V : Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : DecidableEq ι
inst✝⁴ : Field 𝕜
inst✝³ : LinearOrder 𝕜
inst✝² : IsStrictOrderedRing 𝕜
inst✝¹ : AddCommGroup V
inst✝ : Module 𝕜 V
s : Finset ι
x y : ι → V
hs : s.Nontrivial
z : V
c : ι → 𝕜
hc₀ : ∀ i ∈ s, 0 ≤ c i
hc₁ : ∀ i ∈ s, c i ≤ 1
hz : ∀ i ∈ s, (lineMap (y i) (x i)) (c i) = z
i : ι
hi : i ∈ s
hci : c i ≠ 1
hy : ∀ i ∈ s, y i ∈ (convexHull 𝕜) (x '' ↑(s.erase i))
w : ι → 𝕜
hw₀ : ∀ i_1 ∈ s.erase i, 0 ≤ w i_1
hw₁ : ∑ i ∈ s.erase i, w i = 1
hyi : (s.erase i).centerMass w x = y i
j : ι
hj : j ∈ s
hij : i ≠ j
this : (lineMap (y i) (x i)) (c i) = (lineMap (y j) (x j)) (c j)
⊢ ((if i ∈ s ∧ ¬i = j then c i else 0) + ∑ x ∈ s \ {j}, (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 x)⁻¹ •
      ∑ x_1 ∈ s \ {j}, (Pi.single i (c i) x_1 + (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 x_1) • x x_1 =
    y j

failed_attempts: simpa [lineMap_apply, hij, this] using congrArg (fun v ↦ v) this
aesop
simpa [centerMass, sum_add_distrib] using hyi
simpa [this] using (hz j hj).symm
simpa [this] using (hz j hj).symm
simpa [centerMass] using hyi.symm

simpa [centerMass, hij, hi, hj, this, lineMap_apply, affineMap_apply, sdiff_singleton_eq_erase] using
      congrArg (fun z ↦ z) (hz j hj).symm
simpa [lineMap_apply, hij, hci, this] using hyi

simpa [centerMass, sum_add_distrib] using hyi ▸ (by
      have : (s.erase i).centerMass w x = y i := hyi
      simpa [sdiff_singleton_eq_erase, hij] using this)
simpa using congrArg (fun z ↦ lineMap (y j) (x j) (c j)) (this.symm.trans rfl)
simpa [centerMass] using (hwxy j hj).symm
simpa [centerMass, sum_add_distrib] using congrArg (fun p => (lineMap (y j) (x j)) (c j)) this
simpa using hyi
simpa using congrArg (fun t => lineMap (y j) (x j) (c j)) (by simpa using this.symm)
simpa [lineMap_apply, affineMap_apply, this] using congrArg (fun p ↦ (lineMap (y j) (x j)) (c j)) rfl
simpa [centerMass, sum_add_distrib] using hyi
aesop
simpa [lineMap_apply, hij] using congrArg (fun p ↦ lineMap (y j) (x j) (c j)) this
simpa [centerMass, sum_add_distrib] using congrArg (fun p ↦ (lineMap_apply_eq_centerMass_of_eq_lineMap hi hj hij p).symm) this

simpa using (lineMap_eq_centerMass_sdiff_singleton_of_ne_one (s := s) (w := Pi.single i (c i) + (1 - c i) • Function.update w i 0)
      (x := x) (y := y) (i := j) hj hij (sub_ne_zero.2 hci.symm) this)
simpa [centerMass] using hyi.symm
simpa [lineMap_apply] using this
simpa [this] using (hz j hj).symm

have hmem : i ∈ s \ {j} := by
      simp [hi, hij]
    have hne : (∑ x ∈ s \ {j}, (Pi.single i (c i) x + (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 x)) ≠ 0 := by
      have : 0 < ∑ x ∈ s \ {j}, (Pi.single i (c i) x + (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 x) := by
        have hterm :
            0 < (Pi.single i (c i) i + (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 i) := by
          simp [Pi.single_eq_same, Function.update_self, lt_of_le_of_ne (hc₀ _ hi) hci]
        have hle :
            (Pi.single i (c i) i + (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 i) ≤
              ∑ x ∈ s \ {j}, (Pi.single i (c i) x + (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 x) := by
          exact single_le_sum (fun x hx ↦ by
            refine add_nonneg ?_ ?_
            · exact Pi.single_nonneg (α := fun _ ↦ 𝕜) (fun _ ↦ ?_) x
              · intro k
                by_cases hk : k = i
                · subst hk; simpa using hc₀ _ hi
                · simp [Pi.single_eq_of_ne hk]
            · exact mul_nonneg (sub_nonneg.2 <| hc₁ _ hi) (by
                by_cases hx' : x = i
                · subst hx'; simp
                · have : x ∈ s.erase i := by
                    have : x ∈ s := (by
                      have : x ∈ s \ {j} := hx
                      simpa [Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_singleton] using this.1)
                    have : x ≠ i := by
                      intro hxi; subst hxi
                      exact (Finset.mem_sdiff.1 hx).2 (by simp [hij])
                    simpa [Finset.mem_erase, this] using And.intro this this)
                  simpa [Function.update_noteq hx'] using hw₀ _ this)
            ) hmem
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le hterm hle
      exact ne_of_gt this
    have hw : ∑ x ∈ s \ {j}, (Pi.single i (c i) x + (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 x) = 1 := by
      simp [sum_add_distrib, sum_pi_single, hmem, sum_mul, sum_update_of_mem, hi, ← sum_erase_eq_sub,
        hw₁, sub_mul, one_mul, sub_sub_cancel]
    have hw' :
        ((∑ x ∈ s \ {j}, (Pi.single i (c i) x + (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 x)) : 𝕜)⁻¹ = 1 := by
      simp [hw]
    simp [centerMass, hw, hw', this] at *
simpa [lineMap_apply] using congrArg (fun p ↦ (c j)⁻¹ • (p - (1 - c j) • x j)) this

simpa [centerMass, sum_add_distrib] using (congrArg (fun p ↦ (lineMap_apply_eq_centerMass_sdiff_singleton (s := s) (x := x)
      (w := Pi.single i (c i) + (1 - c i) • Function.update w i 0) (i := j) hj).1 p) this)
aesop

have hj' : j ∈ s.erase i := by simp [hj, hij]
    have hwj : (s.erase i).centerMass w x = y i := hyi
    have hsumj : ∑ x ∈ s.erase j, (Pi.single i (c i) x + (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 x) =
        (if i ∈ s ∧ ¬i = j then c i else 0) + ∑ x ∈ s \ {j}, (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 x := by
      simp [Finset.sdiff_singleton_eq_erase, sum_add_distrib, sum_pi_single, hi, hij, sum_update_of_mem, hi,
        sum_update_of_not_mem, hj', Function.update, hij]
    have hne :
        ((if i ∈ s ∧ ¬i = j then c i else 0) +
              ∑ x ∈ s \ {j}, (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 x) ≠ 0 := by
      have : (if i ∈ s ∧ ¬i = j then c i else 0) = c i := by simp [hi, hij]
      simp [this, add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg, hci] at *
    have hw₁' : ∑ x ∈ s.erase j, (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 x = 1 - c i := by
      simp [Finset.sdiff_singleton_eq_erase, sum_mul, ← mul_sum, sum_update_of_mem, hj,
        sum_erase_eq_sub, hw₁, hi, hij]
    have hzj : lineMap (y j) (x j) (c j) = z := hz j hj
    have hzi : lineMap (y i) (x i) (c i) = z := hz i hi
    have hline : lineMap (y j) (x j) (c j) = lineMap (y i) (x i) (c i) := by simpa [hzi, hzj] using this.symm
    have : (s.erase j).centerMass (Pi.single i (c i) + (1 - c i) • Function.update w i 0) x = y j := by
      simpa [centerMass, Finset.sdiff_singleton_eq_erase] using (by
        simpa [centerMass, Finset.sdiff_singleton_eq_erase] )
    simpa [centerMass, Finset.sdiff_singleton_eq_erase] using this
simpa [this] using congrArg (fun p ↦ lineMap_inv_smul_eq_of_eq_lineMap (y := y j) (x := x j) p) this
simpa [lineMap_apply, hij, this] using hyi.trans ?_
simpa [hij, this] using congrArg (fun v ↦ (lineMap (y j) (x j)) (c j)) rfl
